name: My work comp claim for tinnitus from noise was denied, now what?
description: Appeal immediately with better medical proof; get a lawyer.[5]

mainEntity.name: My work comp claim for tinnitus from noise was denied, now what?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal immediately with better medical proof; get a lawyer.[5]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Appeal the denial within 20 days in Utah or per Idaho timelines by requesting Labor Commission review.** Common denial reasons include failure to prove causation or deeming loss age-related; rebut with independent medical exams.[1][2] Gather stronger evidence like new audiologist reports. Deadlines are strict, so act fast. Legal help boosts success rates on appeal.[4]
